title: Core Protocol for Serial Imaging of Fluorescently-Labeled Mouse Brain on the TissueCyte 1000 System
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8khti","text":"This protocol describes the instructions for setup and scanning of fluorescently-labeled tissue sections mounted in agarose and attached to a slide using the TissueCyte 1000 block face 2-photon system.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"daj18","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6risc","text":"Note: Research reported in this publication was supported by the National Institute Of Mental Health of the National Institutes of Health under Award Number U19MH114830.
